ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person physical assist, 8 = ADL activity itself did not occur during entire 7 days
212 G1DA G1DA_SELF_WLK_CORR (G1DA) Walk In Corridor Self Performance CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: walk in corridor - ADL self-performance "-" = Unknown, 0 = Independent - No help or oversight -OR- Help/oversight provided only 1 or 2 times during last
